title: goniopteris juruensis
intro: Goniopteris juruensis is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, commonly known as a type of tree fern. It is native to South America, particularly in the Andes mountain range. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Goniopteris juruensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, and it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in traditional herbal medicine.
